tech_news.title: Pokemon Pokopia sales top 2.2 million in four days - Gematsu
tech_news.description: Total sales for Pokemon Pokopia surpassed 2.2 million units in its first four days of release, The Pokemon Company announced. One million units were sold in Japan alone.

tech_news.title: Nanophotonic waveguide chip-to-world beam scanning - Nature
tech_news.description: A monolithically integrated photonic ski-jump enables scalable, diffraction-limited 2D beam scanning from photonic chips, achieving ultrahigh spot rates, compact footprints and applications spanning displays, sensing and quantum photonics.
